label: 5165c Public notice, comment, and consultation requirements

children.heading: Public notice and comment concerning new or modified policies
children.label: a Public notice and comment concerning new or modified policies
A
children.text: governs implementation of the public assistance program administered by the Federal Emergency Management Agency under this chapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: could result in a significant reduction of assistance under the program.

children.heading: Application
children.label: 2 Application
children.text: Any policy adopted under paragraph (1) shall apply only to a major disaster or emergency declared on or after the date on which the policy is adopted.

children.label: A
children.text: to result in a significant reduction of assistance to applicants for the assistance with respect to the major disaster or emergency; or

children.label: B
children.text: to change the terms of a written agreement to which the Federal Government is a party concerning the declaration of the major disaster or emergency.

children.heading: No legal right of action
children.label: 2 No legal right of action
children.text: Nothing in this subsection confers a legal right of action on any party.

children.heading: Public access
children.label: c Public access
children.text: The President shall promote public access to policies governing the implementation of the public assistance program.
